notes.processing_time_rule: adjusted_processing_time equals original LA processing time for every SRU.
notes.processing_cost_rule: unit_processing_cost depends only on base_machine_id and is identical across all SRUs.
notes.machine_cost_rule: Machine cost is inverse-normalized from the source LA instance mean processing time to [5.0, 12.0], rounded to 2 decimals.
notes.cross_chain_penalty_rule: Cross-chain penalties are symmetric by unordered value-chain pair.
